message:
bd-5bjf: Implement hero scene with branding and capabilities

- Create HeroScene struct implementing Scene trait
- Branded title with "N E B U L A  D E P L O Y" in box
- Capabilities panel showing terminal size, color system, TTY status
- Color palette preview with brand/status/badge samples
- Hyperlink CTAs to docs.rs, GitHub, crates.io
- Update e2e test to check for hero scene content
- All 29 e2e tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 {"id":"bd-1wdf","title":"demo_showcase snapshots: content scenes","description":"Add snapshot coverage for feature-gated content scenes (markdown/syntax/json) and their gating fallbacks.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:29.152241964Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:34.836065078Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","snapshots","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1wdf","depends_on_id":"bd-11zc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:22.236222887Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wdf","depends_on_id":"bd-21ef","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:32.412429593Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wdf","depends_on_id":"bd-3jff","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:34.836036745Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wdf","depends_on_id":"bd-3pwg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:29.968580022Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wdf","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:25.157309351Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wdf","depends_on_id":"bd-3w3u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:27.563234908Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1wdf","depends_on_id":"bd-yzr8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:29.167635706Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":87,"issue_id":"bd-1wdf","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Snapshot contract

For each content scene:
- snapshot the **gating** output when feature is disabled
- snapshot the **rendered** output when feature is enabled (run under `cargo test --features full,tracing`)

This provides strong regression protection for both code paths.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:47Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1wk","title":"PrintOptions.soft_wrap has no behavioral effect","description":"PrintOptions::soft_wrap only forces width selection in Console::print_to; no soft-wrapping behavior is implemented in Text/Console rendering. Decide expected semantics and implement or remove flag.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:10:11.570072666Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:48:29.086509996Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:48:29.086425517Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1x5n","title":"Port rich.theme: Theme + named styles (incl. .ini themes)","description":"Implement Python Rich theme support:

- Theme registry mapping style names -> Style
- Console has a theme, resolves named styles in markup and APIs
- Support loading theme from .ini (Python Rich Theme.read) to keep parity

Acceptance criteria:
- Unit tests for named style resolution + overrides
- Markup tag [warning] uses theme style when defined
- Conformance fixtures include a theme case
- Update docs/spec/parity

-{"id":"bd-1xoj","title":"demo_showcase: dashboard layout builder (wide)","description":"Implement the wide dashboard layout builder using Layout + Panels/Tables.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:50.431586861Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T02:18:41.008283890Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-1388","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:38.913606912Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-1by8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:44.489018112Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:47.045726727Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-2hba","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:41.948693854Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-2smc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:50.442645114Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":30,"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Layout sketch (wide)

Suggested split (columns):
- Left (ratio ~2): pipeline + current step panel
- Right (ratio ~1): services table + quick facts

Then split vertically (rows):
- Top: header bar
- Middle: main content
- Bottom: log tail pane

## Acceptance criteria

- Uses `Layout::split_row` / `split_column` and named nodes for updates.
- All leaf regions render to exactly their region size (no overflow chaos).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:41:19Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-1xoj","title":"demo_showcase: dashboard layout builder (wide)","description":"Implement the wide dashboard layout builder using Layout + Panels/Tables.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:50.431586861Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T02:31:59.424273092Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T02:31:59.424141867Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-1388","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:38.913606912Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-1by8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:44.489018112Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:47.045726727Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-2hba","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:41.948693854Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","depends_on_id":"bd-2smc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:50.442645114Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":30,"issue_id":"bd-1xoj","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Layout sketch (wide)

Suggested split (columns):
- Left (ratio ~2): pipeline + current step panel
- Right (ratio ~1): services table + quick facts

Then split vertically (rows):
- Top: header bar
- Middle: main content
- Bottom: log tail pane

## Acceptance criteria

- Uses `Layout::split_row` / `split_column` and named nodes for updates.
- All leaf regions render to exactly their region size (no overflow chaos).

 {"id":"bd-1y6r","title":"demo_showcase: pipeline simulation (progress + spinners)","description":"Simulate a realistic pipeline using ProgressBar/Spinner (multiple stages, status changes).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RusticReef","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:57.731009017Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T00:21:30.507263960Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","progress"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1y6r","depends_on_id":"bd-1388","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:49.555441705Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1y6r","depends_on_id":"bd-1by8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:54.125717888Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1y6r","depends_on_id":"bd-2smc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:57.746656861Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1y6r","depends_on_id":"bd-3j1s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:51.812951898Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":33,"issue_id":"bd-1y6r","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Pipeline content

Simulate a believable deploy pipeline with stages like:
- Lint
- Build
- Unit tests
- Package
- Deploy
- Smoke tests

Each stage can have:
- status badge (queued/running/ok/warn/fail)
- progress bar (where applicable)
- spinner for active stage

## Acceptance criteria

- Uses both `ProgressBar` and `Spinner` renderables.
- Stage transitions update the dashboard + log pane.
- Supports `--quick` / `--speed` for timing.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:41:41Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1yc8","title":"Port rich.traceback + Console::print_exception equivalent","description":"Implement Python Rich traceback rendering and Console convenience API.

Scope:
- Render exceptions/backtraces to segments with syntax highlighting and locals formatting where possible
- Provide Console::print_exception (or Rust-idiomatic equivalent) matching Rich defaults
- Provide renderable Traceback type

Acceptance criteria:
- Deterministic output for a fixed synthetic stack in tests
- Optional feature flag integration if needed (e.g. backtrace)
- Conformance fixture compares against Python Rich for a controlled exception
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:38:41.714278727Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T21:28:32.406049373Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T21:28:32.405959887Z","close_reason":"Implemented Traceback renderable + Console::print_exception + conformance fixture","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1yc8","depends_on_id":"bd-3c90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:38:46.972253544Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2175","title":"demo_showcase: core renderables showcase scenes","description":"Create scenes that exercise core renderables (Table/Panel/Rule/Tree/Columns/Align/Padding/Emoji) with real-world content.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:35:54.414486281Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:35.167863955Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","renderables"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2175","depends_on_id":"bd-2fl5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:35.167837065Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2175","depends_on_id":"bd-3g9v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:32.654972566Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2175","depends_on_id":"bd-3m5v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:35:54.431275454Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":8,"issue_id":"bd-2175","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Scope

These scenes are the “bread and butter” proof that rich_rust matches Python Rich’s day-to-day power:

- **Rule**: section dividers + styled rules + alignment
- **Panel**: titles/subtitles, multiple box styles, nested panels, padding
- **Table**: auto sizing, alignment, header styles, status badges, ASCII fallback
- **Tree**: guides styles, icons/emoji, collapsed nodes
- **Columns**: multi-column summary blocks
- **Align + Padding**: centered hero text; padded callouts
- **Emoji**: `:shortcode:` replacement + `Emoji` renderable

## Acceptance criteria

- Content should be realistic: service health, config summaries, release checklists, etc.
- Demonstrate both markup-based styling and programmatic `Text`/`Style` building.
- Make narrow-width behavior look intentional (e.g., fewer columns, truncated text with ellipsis).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:36:03Z"}]}
@@ -167,11 +167,11 @@
 {"id":"bd-3w3u","title":"demo_showcase: feature-gate messaging","description":"Define exact user-facing messaging for missing features (syntax/markdown/json/tracing) and the commands to enable them.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:38:20.359674542Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:56:48.512871956Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","features"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3w3u","depends_on_id":"bd-23h8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:38.562399412Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3w3u","depends_on_id":"bd-26gp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:56:48.512845356Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3w3u","depends_on_id":"bd-sowt","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:38:20.371957033Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":19,"issue_id":"bd-3w3u","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## User-facing messaging

When a feature is disabled at compile time, the demo should say so clearly and provide an exact command. Example pattern:

> This scene requires the `syntax` feature.
> Run: `cargo run --bin demo_showcase --features full`

Also include `tracing` guidance separately:
- `cargo run --bin demo_showcase --features full,tracing`

## Acceptance criteria

- Messaging is consistent across Markdown/Syntax/JSON/Tracing scenes.
- Output is still “pretty”: use a panel + named styles rather than plain `println!`.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:38:54Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-4jzg","title":"demo_showcase: Status spinner moments","description":"Use Status spinner for a few short ‘working…’ moments to make the demo feel alive.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:46:22.516615870Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:54.103634833Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","status"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-4jzg","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:54.103605008Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-4jzg","depends_on_id":"bd-1y6r","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:51.512644921Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-4jzg","depends_on_id":"bd-3rhg","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:46:22.528925448Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":57,"issue_id":"bd-4jzg","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Where to use Status

Use sparingly for polish:
- “Validating environment…”
- “Building deployment plan…”
- “Generating export bundle…”

## Acceptance criteria

- In non-interactive mode, prints the message once (no animation).
- In interactive mode, animates briefly and stops cleanly.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:46:38Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-4zjp","title":"Audit existing tests for trivial assertions","description":"## Problem
We found trivial assertions like assert!(x.is_empty() || true) and assert!(!output.is_empty() || output.is_empty()) that were always true and provided no value. There may be more lurking in the codebase.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Audit all test files for trivial assertions that are always true/false
- [ ] Audit for assertions that don't actually verify behavior (just check non-empty)
- [ ] Replace trivial assertions with meaningful ones
- [ ] Add proper style/content verification where output is captured

## Patterns to find
- assert!(x || true)
- assert!(x || !x) 
- assert!(!x.is_empty()) without checking content
- let _ = something; // Just checking it doesn't crash

## Files to audit
- tests/conformance/*.rs
- src/**/*.rs (inline tests)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T04:59:49.161430662Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T05:11:36.867626646Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T05:11:36.867605776Z","close_reason":"Replaced trivial assertions with meaningful content/width checks","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["task"]}
-{"id":"bd-5bjf","title":"demo_showcase: hero + capabilities scene","description":"Implement the hero/capabilities scene: branding, palette preview, environment detection, hyperlinks, emoji.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:06.963744820Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:53.120813985Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","hero"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-5bjf","depends_on_id":"bd-1by8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:50.752840213Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-5bjf","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:48.352025280Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-5bjf","depends_on_id":"bd-2175","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:06.976533058Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-5bjf","depends_on_id":"bd-313x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:53.120787285Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":36,"issue_id":"bd-5bjf","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Content requirements

- Big branded title (aligned/centered) + short tagline.
- Capability panel showing:
  - width/height
  - detected color system
  - is_terminal / is_interactive
  - emoji enabled
- Palette preview: small table or columns block showing primary/accent/status colors.
- A hyperlink CTA (docs + repo).

## Acceptance criteria

- This scene alone should convince a user the library is polished.
- Works in non-TTY mode (prints static content; no prompts).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:27Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-61ky","title":"demo_showcase tests: feature gating behavior","description":"Add tests for feature-gated scenes: when features are off, output includes enable commands; when on, output renders real content.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:10:17.320950396Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:27.086596657Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","features","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-61ky","depends_on_id":"bd-11zc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:13.137472850Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-61ky","depends_on_id":"bd-21ef","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:22.393590221Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-61ky","depends_on_id":"bd-26gp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:17.798870508Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-61ky","depends_on_id":"bd-2sk1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:10:17.336257448Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-61ky","depends_on_id":"bd-325x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:27.086563946Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-61ky","depends_on_id":"bd-3jff","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:24.739709353Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-61ky","depends_on_id":"bd-3pwg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:20.104130064Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-61ky","depends_on_id":"bd-3w3u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:15.459762901Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":72,"issue_id":"bd-61ky","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## What to test

For each feature-gated scene:
- When the feature is **disabled**, the scene must still run and print a styled panel containing:
  - feature name
  - exact enable command (`--features ...`)

When the feature is **enabled**, it must render real content (not just the enable panel).

## Acceptance criteria

- Gating behavior is consistent across Markdown/Syntax/JSON/Tracing scenes.
- Enable commands are correct and kept in sync with the chosen feature strategy (bd-26gp).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:11:07Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-6ozb","title":"demo_showcase: final polish + QA","description":"Polish pass: visual tweaks, timing, edge cases; ensure all quality gates pass and demo feels ‘product grade’.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:28.642592479Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:14:17.783744643Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","polish","qa"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-164e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:15.925273437Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-2175","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:08.824416694Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-2sk1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:13:35.835459296Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-2smc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:06.360421270Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-2xsi","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:13.617768058Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-3bid","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:18.150875345Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-3m5v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:28.660699129Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-3rhg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:22.625349203Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-3vf2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:11.348492415Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","depends_on_id":"bd-ohsq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:50:20.376258928Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":14,"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Checklist

- Run full quality gates:
  - `cargo fmt --check`
  - `cargo check --all-targets`
  - `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
  - `cargo test`
- Visual pass on at least:
  - wide terminal (>= 120 cols)
  - narrow terminal (~70 cols)
  - piped output (`| cat`)
- Ensure the demo ends cleanly: cursor restored, alt-screen disabled, no stray control codes.

## Acceptance criteria

- Demo looks “designed”, not like a pile of examples.
- All scenes have consistent titles, spacing, and style usage.
- Total runtime feels appropriate; `--quick` exists for CI/dev.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:37Z"},{"id":77,"issue_id":"bd-6ozb","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Update: automated regression suite is required

Final QA must include the automated demo_showcase regression suite (`bd-2sk1`):
- per-scene smoke tests
- snapshot tests
- export bundle e2e tests
- non-interactive safety tests

This reduces reliance on manual eyeballing and prevents “works on my terminal” regressions.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:14:17Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-6tj5","title":"demo_showcase tests: CLI + Config unit tests","description":"Expand unit tests for CLI/config: defaults, invalid flags, and new flags like --seed/--links.","notes":"Added 12 new unit tests covering: default config values, --quick, --force-terminal, -h short form, all color system variants, missing flag values, non-finite/negative speed, all boolean pairs, width/height non-integer, positional arg rejection, and combined flags.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ubuntu","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:10:04.773473520Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T00:46:48.320559684Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T00:46:48.320428780Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cli","demo_showcase","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-6tj5","depends_on_id":"bd-2sk1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:10:04.794750840Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-6tj5","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:12:16.075340749Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":67,"issue_id":"bd-6tj5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Unit test scope

Expand unit tests inside `src/bin/demo_showcase.rs` to cover:
- default config values (including derived defaults like interactive/live/screen auto modes)
- parsing of numeric flags (`--speed`, `--width`, `--height`, `--seed`)
- boolean flag pairs (`--foo` / `--no-foo`)
- mutual exclusion rules (e.g. `--export` vs `--export-dir`)
- friendly error messages

## Acceptance criteria

- Tests are deterministic and do not require a TTY.
- Test failures point directly to the CLI regression.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:10:52Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-86gp","title":"demo_showcase: capture output for export","description":"Add capture mode to demo runner so scenes can be captured to segments for exporting.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownIsland","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:53.628166487Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T02:17:08.397340920Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","export"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-86gp","depends_on_id":"bd-12nv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:41.570665666Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-86gp","depends_on_id":"bd-164e","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:53.642928274Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-86gp","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:39.207097640Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":50,"issue_id":"bd-86gp","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Approach

- When `--export` or `--export-dir` is set, run the demo with capture enabled:
  - `console.begin_capture()`
  - run selected scenes
  - then call `export_html` / `export_svg`

Be careful: capture + Live/alt-screen don't mix well. For export runs, prefer non-live mode (static output).

## Acceptance criteria

- Export run produces stable artifacts without requiring a TTY.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:45:06Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-86gp","title":"demo_showcase: capture output for export","description":"Add capture mode to demo runner so scenes can be captured to segments for exporting.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownIsland","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:53.628166487Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T02:31:34.609990369Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T02:31:34.609928834Z","close_reason":"Export capture implemented: run_export() captures console output and writes HTML/SVG files. All 73 tests pass.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","export"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-86gp","depends_on_id":"bd-12nv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:41.570665666Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-86gp","depends_on_id":"bd-164e","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:53.642928274Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-86gp","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:39.207097640Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":50,"issue_id":"bd-86gp","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Approach

- When `--export` or `--export-dir` is set, run the demo with capture enabled:
  - `console.begin_capture()`
  - run selected scenes
  - then call `export_html` / `export_svg`

Be careful: capture + Live/alt-screen don't mix well. For export runs, prefer non-live mode (static output).

## Acceptance criteria

- Export run produces stable artifacts without requiring a TTY.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:45:06Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-abyl","title":"demo_showcase: dashboard layout fallback (narrow)","description":"Implement a narrow terminal fallback layout (collapse sidebar / stack panels).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:52.679493487Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:10.518019854Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-abyl","depends_on_id":"bd-1xoj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:10.517989587Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-abyl","depends_on_id":"bd-2smc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:52.704817099Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":31,"issue_id":"bd-abyl","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Narrow-mode behavior

When width is below a threshold (e.g. < 80):
- collapse sidebar beneath main
- reduce table columns / abbreviate labels
- prefer single-column stacking over cramped two-column layout

## Acceptance criteria

- No panics due to zero-width regions.
- Narrow mode still looks intentional and readable.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:41:25Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-cisk","title":"demo_showcase snapshots: debug tools","description":"Add insta snapshot coverage for debug_tools output (pretty/inspect + traceback).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:26.212372214Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:19.830717662Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","snapshots","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-11zc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:12.481243908Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-1365","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:19.830681455Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-3fqt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:17.433057178Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:14.925073557Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-yzr8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:26.227535266Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":86,"issue_id":"bd-cisk","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Snapshot contract

Snapshot `debug_tools` scene output (pretty/inspect + traceback) in no-color or ANSI-stripped mode.

Ensure traceback and inspect outputs are stable for a fixed seed/config.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:44Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-eb17","title":"Port rich.prompt/status/pager equivalents (interactive helpers)","description":"Implement the interactive helper layer from Python Rich.

Scope (Rust-idiomatic):
- Prompt: styled input with validation and defaults
- Status: spinner + message context manager
- Pager: send output through pager when available

Acceptance criteria:
- Cross-platform behavior (Unix + Windows) behind crossterm
- Unit tests for parsing/validation logic; integration tests for non-interactive fallback
